heading: Federal breakwaters and jetties
label: 2351b Federal breakwaters and jetties
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 2022, and also as part of the James M. Inhofe National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2023, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In carrying out repair or maintenance activity of a Federal jetty, pile dike, or breakwater associated with an authorized navigation project, the Secretary shall, notwithstanding the authorized dimensions of the jetty, pile dike, or breakwater, ensure that such repair or maintenance activity is sufficient to meet the authorized purpose of such project, including ensuring that any harbor or inland harbor associated with the project is protected from projected changes in wave action or height (including changes that result from relative sea level change over the useful life of the project).

children.label: A
children.text: projected changes in wave action or height, including changes that result from relative sea level change, will diminish the functionality of the jetty, pile dike, or breakwater to meet the authorized purpose of the project; and

children.label: B
children.text: such repair or maintenance activity is necessary to restore such functionality; or

children.label: A
children.text: the structural integrity of the jetty, pile dike, or breakwater is degraded as a result of a lack of such regular and routine Federal maintenance activity; or

children.label: B
children.text: the pile dike has disconnected from an authorized navigation project as a result of a lack of such regular and routine Federal maintenance activity.
